pre_assessment.planned_strategy: Chain: (1) as_bytes_post gives bytes = v%p, (2) from_bytes_post gives decoded = bytes % pow2(255), (3) lemma_small_mod since v%p < p < pow2(255), (4) lemma_mod_twice for (v%p)%p = v%p
